name: Radio
description: Single-select control for picking exactly one option (Figma 541:6675, component set 379:3350). The circle is a fixed 18px regardless of size: transparent with a gray.40 border when unchecked, primary.50 with a white 8px dot when checked — the dot stays white even while disabled (gray.20 fill). An optional label sits at a 6px gap; size only scales the label (md 14 — base, lg 16) and bold renders it SemiBold. Same-name radios form a native exclusive group, so the visual rides the platform checked state.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Visible label next to the circle, sized by the size variant (md 14/lg 16); also names the radio.

props.name: checked
props.description: Controlled value (Figma checked). Uncontrolled same-name radios keep exclusivity natively.

props.name: name
props.description: Same-name radios form a native exclusive group.

props.name: bold
props.description: SemiBold label for emphasized items (Figma bold).

props.name: onCheckedChange
props.description: Fires with the next value when the radio is selected.

limitations: Ships as podo-radio CSS classes on a native input; a shadow element would break same-name group exclusivity across shadow roots.
No native group: the consumer keeps exactly one checked.

keyboard: Arrow keys move within the same-name group
accessibility.focusManagement: Radio is a native input; group roving focus follows the platform.

examples.title: Plan choice
examples.code:
<Radio name="plan" value="basic" label="베이직" defaultChecked />
<Radio name="plan" value="pro" label="프로" />
